title: Phase 8 Gate — 0.6.0 supplemental
description: Phase 8 sets epic.design_direction.locked to true once foundational mocks are approved. When locked, shell_summary must be the structured object defined by epic-schema.json (nav, header, layout, colors, typography, spacing, components) — not free-form prose — so detail mocks inherit deterministically and the spec renders the design system as data.
